message: No action needed: Inspected all 1,001 check runs on the HEAD commit of main (b8396fc28de905068208e12d026b158410f2af37, 2026-03-13). Zero check runs have a conclusion of 'failure' — CI is fully green. Two recent non-HEAD commits had transient issues (netapp build infra error with 0 test failures, keyvault-certificates canceled runs), but these did not persist to the current HEAD. No GitHub issue is warranted.
